title: MejuBot — Music, Stats, and More in One Discord Bot
linkAction: Add Mejubot on your Discord server
description: MejuBot is an all-in-one server companion I built to make Discord communities more interactive, engaging, and fun. Officially verified by Discord, it lets users stream music, check PUBG stats, and enjoy mini-games like stock market simulations. I focused on seamless integration and powerful features to enhance the overall user experience.
youtubeMusicPlaybackDesc: Stream music from YouTube directly into your voice channels using discord-player and @discordjs/opus.
pubgStatsIntegrationDesc: Fetch and display real-time PUBG player statistics through external APIs.
virtualStockMarketGameDesc: Engage users with a simulated stock trading game, complete with real-time updates and leaderboard tracking.
multiLanguageSupportDesc: Users can set their preferred language, and all commands and responses adapt dynamically.
